raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Description : On XX/XX/XXXX, a fraudulent charge of {$1300.00} was made at Best Buy XXXX using a Citibank credit card that I did not request, activate, or authorize. The bank issued a replacement card in XX/XX/XXXX and mailed it to an outdated address I had not lived at for over XXXX years, automatically sending the credit card when I didn't even request for a new one in the first place. I lived at my current for at least four years and sent them proof ( verified via bank statements and utility bills ). 

The card was fraudulently activated using spoofed caller ID, as evidenced by T-Mobile call logs proving I never contacted Citibank prior XXXX XX/XX/XXXX. A police report ( Case # XXXX ) was filed to document the identity theft. 

Despite submitting the police report, call logs, and address verification to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX, the bank has : Failed to provide updates or reverse the charge. 
Ignored evidence proving the transaction was unauthorized. 

This negligence enabled fraud and has left me liable for a charge I did not incur.
